Highly unprofessional cheat customers I shared doctor prescription with all test details to be done and asked for price asking ensure all test are covered but these people are fraudsters multiple times I had to check myself for test coverage and they were trying to collect money without covering test and now when I visited doctor came to know that test not covered and when I message see attached response highly unethical and unreliable diagnostic centre will not recommend anyone going forward

I had a great experience at Red diagnostics. Everything is so systematic and radiologists are so experienced and helpful.
I have gone through my corporate plan of Gold Health complete check up. I really loved their services, hygiene and on time delivery of reports.

I had a very disappointing experience at SERUM Analysis Centre, Asansol. As a chronic kidney patient, I received a blood report from this lab showing my serum phosphate level as 9.02 mg/dL, which was dangerously high and caused a lot of stress and unnecessary expenses for repeat tests and scans. When I got retested at Healthworld Hospitals Asansol, my phosphate level was 3.32 mg/dL-completely normal-and my doctor confirmed the first report was clearly wrong. After checking the NABL official database, I found that the Asansol branch of SERUM is NOT NABL-accredited, even though the group advertises NABL certification. Such errors and misleading claims are unacceptable for a diagnostic lab. I strongly advise others to be cautious and always verify reports and certifications before making medical decisions.

Worst service provider. Extremely high costs. This place is covered under CGHS( Central Government Health Scheme) for central government employees and pensioners. But the management first misguides and then refuses to work under CGHS. A complain should be registered at respected offices

It is under CGHS. But it is quite strange that they ask the card holder for OTP sent to card holder's mobile registered for CGHS.  Actually no OTP should be shared with others. OTP is for mobile owner only. Then why shold it be shared with counter person?. It is simply misguiding, Even cheating is possible also. Therefore patient party should be careful about this. The behaviour of the receptionist is not well mannered.
Careless  centre. I 've a bitter and tremendous experience. When the report of another diagnostic centre is normal SERUM sent me the report of acute leukaemia i.e. cancer.

We had lots of difficulties to find the location. There is no board no poster or banner about the lab. We reach at 8:35 am however the lab open at 9am and in Google map at their location show the lab open at 8am which is false. We asked 2-3 people about the lab but no one knows about this. Finally we called at their given number and they guide wrong direction. We ask one more guy which he guide us to find exact place. Also till time lab tech came. He was nice and talk gently and we don't have any issue with his work however we are not satisfied with lab Report specially my wife sgpt and ldl triglycerides and vldl is high. Also if we go to other pathlab they provide us serial number so we can download the report at same day but they have procedure if you are going to their location frm your health insurance you have to download report from their we or app. Hope they will consider this feedback specially some direction or location they will mark so people don't have to roam here and there for finding lab.

I had a great experience at FIFTY ONE PLUS LAB, Noida (One Plus Lab). The lab facilities are excellent, and all the staff are very cooperative and professional. The staff is courteous, and the entire process went smoothly. The lab environment is clean and organized. Overall, this is a great lab, and I highly recommend its services.
Completely unprofessional, nobody comes on time when I reached only a dog is there. My reporting time was 8 AM  and when I called they mention that staff comes by 8:30 to 9. Also an unhygienic place.

I was quite impressed when I visited but after two months, my opinion is totally changed.
Quality /test results are bad even though they are quite fast.

I had Niva Bupa insurance and this lab has a tie up for annual check up with them.

I saw the reviews and booked my wife's annual health check up. I was quite impressed with the clockwork speed they work. Everything was working as well oiled machine and within 1 hour everything was done (including ultrasound, pap smear etc.). Both of us were quite impressed with the efficiency of the lab at that time (second week of October 2025).

Fast forward to Last week of November (6 weeks post annual check up), my wife had quite sever pain in abdomen. We went for ultrasound to a different lab and doctor said she is having stone in kidney(5mm) and gall bladder (3mm).

So, yes they are fast & efficient but quality is not reliable and for health, quality of tests is of highest importance and NOT HOW FAST You can provide the service.

I will not recommend this lab to anyone.

Three days of no showing up; they provide home collection appointments daily, and requests for 12 hours fasting.

Day 1: Sir, I am late, so I prefer not to come; it's hot
Day 2: My bike isn't working. I said, I am happy to wait, but he insisted on rescheduling for the next day
Day 3: Sir, I am sick, so I won't be coming. No response to messages or calls.

Extremely horrible service. Pathetic on-call staff with no respect for time and life.

I wish the government would cancel their license.

⭐ (1 star — would give zero if possible)

One of the worst medical experiences we have ever had. My father is a cancer and diabetes patient, and we travelled 50km from Mundgod for a scan at this centre — every single phase was a struggle.

Appointment booking: We called 2 days in advance to get a confirmed time so we could arrange a driver and plan the journey. Instead of a straight answer, they kept brushing us off — "call in the evening," "call in the morning," "call tomorrow." Despite this, we still paid the advance in good faith.

Zero instructions: No one bothered to tell us basic pre-scan instructions — empty stomach or not? Water allowed or not? For a cancer patient undergoing a contrast scan, this is not optional information. We had to figure it out ourselves.

Appointment time was meaningless: They finally confirmed 7:30 AM and told us to do the blood test at their facility before the scan. We reached on time in the early morning — the centre was empty except for ONE person sleeping on the sofa, who turned out to be staff. He kept saying "come at 8," then "come at 8:30," with zero care or clarity.

2-hour wait for a sick, fasting patient: The actual staff arrived only at 8:30 AM. My elderly father — a cancer and diabetes patient — was made to wait nearly 2 hours on an empty stomach because of their delay.

No guidance, no coordination: Even for standard parts of the process like the contrast, we had to ASK for every single step. Nobody walked us through anything.

Staff only care about money: The counter staff were actively attending to other patients only for payment collection. Every time we asked what the next step was, we were ignored.

Reports never delivered: We were officially told the reports would be available within 4 hours. It has now been over a DAY. We have been calling them repeatedly and still haven't received the reports. For a cancer patient whose treatment decisions depend on these reports, this is unacceptable and borderline negligent.

Appointments here mean nothing. Instructions are non-existent. Staff are indifferent to patient condition. Reports are not delivered on time. Please do not bring a seriously ill family member here expecting basic standards of care.

The diagnostic services were satisfactory, but the staff need to improve their customer relationship and communication skills. Responses to queries were not very polite or helpful, which affected the overall experience. Better customer interaction would make a big difference.
All workers is very good. Satish sir is v good worker in the hospital. And smile face every day .

Highly recommended for anyone looking for reliable diagnostic services.
